params.courtSheetACid: IPFS CID of exporter court sheet (ANB customs exit)
params.courtSheetBCid: IPFS CID of importer court sheet (SUNAT border gate)
params.statement: Factual statement submitted to the court

params.timeliness: true = shipment was timely (release); false = late (refund)

ORACLE_TYPE().notice: Oracle type identifier for the relay's ORACLE_REGISTRY.

acceptShipment().notice: Accept the shipment as timely.         Before contestDeadline: only the importer can call.         After contestDeadline: anyone can call — prevents indefinite hold-up.         Short-circuits the court path. Settlement can proceed immediately via settle().

arbitrator().notice: Designated human arbitrator for UNDETERMINED verdicts.         Defaults to admin. Can be updated via setArbitrator().

bridgeReceiver().notice: InternetCourt BridgeReceiver address on Base Sepolia.         Authorised to call processBridgeMessage() with LayerZero-delivered verdicts.         Set once at construction; immutable after that.

contestDeadline().notice: Deadline after which contestShipment() is rejected.         Set to shipmentCheckTime + 7 days when fundSettlement() is called.         After this deadline, anyone (not just the importer) can call acceptShipment().

contestShipment(string,string,string,str.notice: Importer contests shipment timing. Pauses settlement.         Reverts after contestDeadline — buyer cannot hold up indefinitely.

courtContract().notice: Address of the deployed GenLayer ShipmentDeadlineCourt contract.         Set via setCourtContract(). When non-zero, resolveShipmentVerdict         accepts calls from this address. The relayer remains a fallback for testnet.

courtFactory().notice: InternetCourtFactory address. Set at construction; zero = IC disabled.

finalizeAfterShipment().notice: Finalize settlement after shipment is confirmed TIMELY or ACCEPTED.         Cannot proceed if LATE (funds were refunded inline) or UNDETERMINED (frozen).

getOracleArgs().notice: ABI-encoded constructor args for ShipmentDeadlineCourt.py.         Schema (matches relay's ORACLE_REGISTRY["TRADE_FINANCE_V1"].decode):           (string case_id, address settlement_contract, string statement,            string guideline_version, string court_sheet_a_cid, string court_sheet_b_cid)         The relay appends bridge_sender, target_chain_eid, target_contract from its config.

getOracleType().notice: Oracle type for the relay's ORACLE_REGISTRY. Identifies ShipmentDeadlineCourt.py.

icCaseId().notice: IC case ID assigned by the factory when registerCase() is called.

processBridgeMessage(uint32,address,byte.notice: Callback for LayerZero-delivered verdicts from GenLayer InternetCourt bridge.         Decodes the nested message and dispatches to resolveShipmentVerdict().

resolveManualReview(bool,string).notice: Arbitrator delivers a binding human finding after UNDETERMINED verdict.         This is the defined escape hatch for insufficient-evidence cases.

setArbitrator(address).notice: Update the arbitrator for UNDETERMINED manual reviews.

setCourtContract(address).notice: Wire the GenLayer ShipmentDeadlineCourt contract address.         Once set, verdicts must come from this address (relayer remains fallback).

setResolution(uint8,string).notice: Verdict delivery from InternetCourtFactory after GenLayer oracle finalizes.         Only the registered courtFactory may call this.         Verdict codes (set by ShipmentDeadlineCourt.py): 1=ON_TIME, 2=LATE_1_4, 3=LATE_5_6, 4=LATE_7_8, 5=VERY_LATE, 6=UNDETERMINED.

submitReturnProof(string,string).notice: Importer submits proof of return/rejection.         Placeholder for Phase 2 evaluation.

timeoutManualReview().notice: Default UNDETERMINED to LATE after MANUAL_REVIEW_WINDOW has elapsed.         Callable by anyone — prevents permanent freeze if arbitrator is unavailable.         Importer bears the evidence burden: insufficient evidence defaults to refund.

timeoutReturnProof().notice: Anyone can call this to settle with a penalty if the return proof window expires.
